message:
feat(robot): add --robot-terse flag for ultra-compact output

Adds a terse output mode for robot commands that provides single-line
encoded state suitable for embedded systems or constrained environments.

New Flag:
  --robot-terse    Output ultra-compact single-line state

Use Cases:
- Embedded status bars with limited space
- Shell prompt integration
- High-frequency polling with minimal bandwidth
- Log-friendly single-line format

Also updates robot tests to use bv.BeadsSummary type following
the type consolidation in the previous commit.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
